turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I did a urine culture test here 3 days ago. The results haven't come. Can you check?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello! I understand you're waiting for your urine culture report. May I have your name?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Seema Bhatt. I came last... Tuesday I think.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Seema ji. I want to help, but unfortunately the lab report status and turnaround times are not something I can access from this helpline. I wouldn't want to give you wrong information.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay but it's been 3 days. Is that normal for this test?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Urine cultures do typically take 48-72 hours, so it's possible it's ready or nearly ready. But for the exact status, our lab team is the right contact. I'll connect you to our staff immediately who can check this for you.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes please, I really need to know.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. Please hold — let me connect you to our staff right now.
